ctypes_load_so:
import ctypes
# Load the shared library
lib = ctypes.CDLL('{path}')
# Define argument and return types
lib.{function_name}.argtypes = [{arg_types}]
lib.{function_name}.restype = {res_type}
# Call function
result = lib.{function_name}({args})
print(f'Native result: {result}')
nasm_x86_64_hello:
section .data
    msg db 'FORGE Native ASM', 0xa
    len equ $ - msg

section .text
    global _start

_start:
    mov rax, 1          ; sys_write
    mov rdi, 1          ; stdout
    mov rsi, msg
    mov rdx, len
    syscall

    mov rax, 60         ; sys_exit
    xor rdi, rdi
    syscall
lief_binary_info:
import lief
binary = lief.parse('{path}')
print(f'Binary: {binary.name}')
print(f'Format: {binary.format}')
for section in binary.sections:
    print(f'  Section: {section.name} (size: {section.size})')
